_doc: Operations inventory for the Relatedness Atlas. Round 1 (2026-05-11) ships an empty operations table. The Mendelian segregation tester and the Compatibility partner-finder run entirely in-browser today (binomial / multinomial / chi-square stats over the karyotype matrix). Future rounds may promote heavy operations to server-side compute (e.g. cohort-wide drive scan over 50k variants).

mendelian_dyad_test._doc: Binomial Mendelian test for a single (parent, offspring) dyad across the inversion subset.

mendelian_triad_test._doc: Multinomial Mendelian test for a single (parent_a, parent_b, offspring) triad.

cohort_mendelian_scan.input: karyotype_matrix + all dyads OR all triads in current hub
cohort_mendelian_scan.output: per-inversion p-value table + category (PASS / WARN / FAIL / SKEW / DRIVE_CANDIDATE / NEEDS_CROSSES / FAMILY_SUSPECT)
cohort_mendelian_scan._doc: Cohort-wide Mendelian scan across all candidates. Likely promoted to a server endpoint if it becomes the bottleneck.

compatibility_search.input: focal_individual + target_karyotype + (single | chrom | all) scope + filters
compatibility_search._doc: Breeding-partner finder. Returns all partners whose cross with the focal would produce the target karyotype with non-zero probability.
